name: Eddie Montalvo
description: '''Edwin "Eddie" Montalvo''' (born September 25, 1952) is an American percussionist and bandleader of Puerto Rican descent. Born and raised in the [[The Bronx|Bronx]], He is best known for playing the [[conga]]s for [[Héctor Lavoe|Hector Lavoe]], [[Rubén Blades]] as well as with the [[Fania All-Stars]].
